text: Sentence: This simplifies software engineering, as there are no natural limits to the potential of software Entity1: software engineering (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).

Sentence: It is pointless to look for universal notations, methods, or techniques for software engineering because different types of software require different approaches Entity1: software engineering (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).
Sentence: All of these applications need software engineering; they do not all need the same software engineering techniques Entity1: software engineering (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).
Sentence: Software engineering is intended to support professional software development, rather than individual programming Entity1: software engineering (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).

Sentence: Good software should deliver the required functionality and performance to the user and should be maintainable, dependable, and usable Entity1: software (CONCEPT). Entity2: performance (CONCEPT).
Sentence: Software engineering is an engineering discipline that is concerned with all aspects of software production Entity1: software engineering (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).

Sentence: Software engineering is an engineering discipline that is concerned with all aspects of software production from the early stages of system specification through to maintaining the system after it has gone into use Entity1: software engineering (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).
Sentence: Software engineering is not just concerned with the technical processes of software development Entity1: software engineering (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).

Sentence: It also includes activities such as software project management and the development of tools, methods, and theories to support software production Entity1: software project management (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).

Sentence: The waterfall model : This takes the fundamental process activities of specification, development, validation, and evolution and represents them as separate process phases such as requirements specification, software design, implementation, testing, and so on Entity1: software (CONCEPT). Entity2: validation (CONCEPT).

Sentence: Another important model is the V-Model (Verification and Validation), where each development phase is paired with a corresponding testing phase, ensuring high quality and reliability, especially in critical systems Entity1: verification (CONCEPT). Entity2: validation (CONCEPT).

Sentence: the Iterative model focuses on building the system in repeated cycles, gradually improving it with each version, while the Incremental model develops the software in smaller functional parts, delivering usable features step by step Entity1: software (CONCEPT). Entity2: incremental model (METHOD).

Sentence: The DevOps model represents a modern approach that integrates development and operations teams to enable continuous integration, testing, and deployment, ensuring faster and more reliable software delivery Entity1: devops (TOPIC). Entity2: software (CONCEPT).
